required_security_actions.reason: REGULATED data classification (EU personal data present: shift schedules and employee IDs for EU-based facilities) combined with TIER_1 direct API integration to SAP S/4HANA. ISP-001 §12.2 mandates CISO + CIO written approval, mandatory penetration test, and SOC 2 Type II certification for Tier 1 integrations.

Vendor will access RESTRICTED information (ERP credentials, RESTRICTED data per ISP-001 §5). NDA status is PENDING. ISP-001 §12.1.4 mandates full NDA execution prior to disclosure of CONFIDENTIAL or RESTRICTED information. Onboarding may not proceed to information-exchange phase until NDA execution is confirmed.

Direct API integration with regulated data in scope requires explicit data-handling agreement defining field-level scope of access (shift schedules, employee IDs for EU facilities). ISP-001 §12.2 Tier 1 requirements include field-level scope documentation.
